caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt, a brown bowtie, and a tall, spiked grey wig, sits in a studio setting. He is equipped with over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks holding apparel, including a "LEE" branded item. A logo on the screen reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" along with "100% realness" and "LIVE podcast". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, gesturing slightly with his hand and moving his mouth as he speaks, while his gaze shifts subtly. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up, with the lighting and background elements remaining constant as he continues his conversation.
